mapper.select: SELECT * FROM red_tourism_sites WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_time IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO red_tourism_sites (name, cover_image, images, type, region, address, latitude, longitude, description, history, significance, ticket_info, open_time, traffic_info, tips, tags, rating, visit_count, is_recommended, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{coverImage}, #{images}, #{type}, #{region}, #{address}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{description}, #{history}, #{significance}, #{ticketInfo}, #{openTime}, #{trafficInfo}, #{tips}, #{tags}, #{rating}, #{visitCount}, #{isRecommended}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE red_tourism_sites SET name = #{name}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, images = #{images}, type = #{type}, region = #{region}, address = #{address}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, description = #{description}, history = #{history}, significance = #{significance}, ticket_info = #{ticketInfo}, open_time = #{openTime}, traffic_info = #{trafficInfo}, tips = #{tips}, tags = #{tags}, rating = #{rating}, visit_count = #{visitCount}, is_recommended = #{isRecommended}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE red_tourism_sites SET is_recommended = #{isRecommended}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
